parsed_review.summary: CP00-795 (Risk C, 150 units, RP26.P02.M06.S01-RP26.P03.M02.S14, Enterprise SaaS Hardening service-evidence/API-foundation descriptor) passes independent read-only review with no findings. Independent inspection of the in-scope source (packages/enterprise/src/service.js, registry.js, validators.js), the contract (contracts/enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.json), the validator (scripts/validate-rp26-enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.mjs), and tests (packages/enterprise/test/model.test.js) confirms a strictly descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data implementation. NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION plus validateDescriptor guards actively reject runtime execution, raw/tenant/SSO/SCIM/secret payloads, runtime permission evaluation, audit writes, cross-tenant routes, and enterprise-trust claims; the CP795 case-set/descriptor/Hermes/Claude/handoff creators reuse this validated pattern. The contract promotes CP00-795 as latest_pack/latest_projection with validation.valid=true and CP788-794 retained as historical projections, and the CP795 tests assert coverage parity with the live plan, runtime-closed descriptors/packets, Claude read-only/non-final-approver, and Hermes emitting no runtime receipt. Closeout artifacts (adjudication in_progress/no, construction-inspection PENDING/production_ready:false, claude-review-result pending, manifest production_ready_descriptor_verified:false/runtime_ready:false/review pending with null receipt) correctly withhold the production_ready and enterprise-trust claims pending exactly one valid hardened read-only receipt — this review supplies it. Review-hardening prerequisites hold: auth preflight passed with well-formed JSON, prompt within size limit with no embedded full diff/source, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools, and no prior invalid attempts. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approval authority; Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor-only review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime. Provenance note: command-evidence.json records all expected validation commands at exit_code 0 (npm test/validate/closeout/spec/weighted/fullplan/goal/rp00/rp26 and git diff --check); these are recorded agent results I did not re-execute under the read-only constraint, but they are consistent with my static inspection of source, contract, and tests.
